title: Sentinel Shield profile manifest
description: Declares the files a profile installs/syncs into a consuming project. Consumed by scripts/install-baseline.sh and scripts/sync-baseline.sh (v0.1.11+).

never_touch.description: Project-local paths the installer/sync MUST never create or overwrite (e.g. accepted-risks.json, phpstan-baseline.neon).

required_scripts.description: Upstream Sentinel Shield scripts the installed workflow calls (informational; they live in Sentinel Shield, not copied).

source.description: Path relative to the Sentinel Shield repo root.

target.description: Path relative to the consuming project root.

mode.description: create-if-missing: write only if absent (project owns it after). overwrite-if-force: managed; create if absent, overwrite only with --force. sync-managed-block: managed marker block updated in place (reserved). manual: never auto-written; printed for the maintainer to handle.
